hero.title: About Me
hero.summary: I design and deliver APIs and data-driven platforms that improve reliability and automation in production. Skilled in backend frameworks, relational databases, Docker containers, and CI/CD pipelines. With {years}+ years of experience building enterprise web applications, REST APIs, internal platforms, and database-driven business systems.

badges.delivery: Delivered 15+ production deployments with automated CI/CD.
badges.integration: Built integrations used in enterprise workflows (20+).

modal.title: Professional Profiles
modal.connect_text: I'm always open to discussing new opportunities, collaborations, or just connecting with fellow developers. Feel free to reach out through any of these platforms.
modal.connect_subtitle: Connect with me on various platforms

intro.paragraph1: I'm a Backend / Full-Stack Developer with {years}+ years building enterprise web apps, REST APIs, internal platforms, and database-driven business systems. My core stack includes Laravel, Yii, Symfony, MySQL/MariaDB, Docker, and CI/CD.
intro.paragraph2: I've delivered enterprise management, EMIS, and donor management systems, leading teams and owning delivery from requirements to deployment. I focus on clean architecture, reporting, reliable integrations (including DATEV), and maintainable code.

skills.mission: I specialize in designing and implementing enterprise-grade software solutions that solve complex business challenges, combining modern development practices with reliable integrations to deliver measurable results.

workExperience.heading: Work Experience
workExperience.description: A concise view of the roles behind the resume, focused on backend ownership, systems thinking, and delivery in production environments.

entries.summary: Further developed and maintained a comprehensive enterprise management system supporting customers, tickets, offers, orders, invoicing, project workflows, employee time tracking, and reporting.
highlights: Built REST integrations, including DATEV-related workflows, and contributed to secure authentication, role-based access control, and business-critical internal process automation.
Developed reporting, export, and dashboard functionality while improving maintainability, usability, and performance through code optimization and database query refinement.
Contributed to modernization of legacy application areas through structured backend logic, refactoring, testing, and continuous integration practices.
Built responsive internal interfaces and AJAX-based workflows to support efficient day-to-day operations across multiple modules.

entries.summary: Led a team of five while remaining deeply hands-on in the design, development, testing, deployment, and maintenance of PHP-based business applications.
highlights: Built backend logic, integrated APIs, implemented frontend-backend workflows, and contributed directly to new features across multiple web applications.
Worked on database design, schema changes, optimization, and data handling to support evolving backend requirements and newly introduced business features.
Managed deployments and application updates across hosting environments and Linux-based local network systems, including SSH-based workflows and production support.
Maintained coding standards, code reviews, documentation, and secure, maintainable implementation practices while resolving technical blockers and supporting reliable software delivery.

entries.summary: Led the development and maintenance of a centralized Education Management Information System supporting student, staff, finance, and user administration workflows.
highlights: Managed relational database structures, backend logic, and secure access flows with a strong focus on data integrity, reliability, and maintainability.
Implemented authentication, authorization, and role-based access control for administrators and staff across multiple modules.
Improved system performance, security, and compatibility through structured upgrades, infrastructure improvements, and ongoing application refinement.

entries.summary: Contributed to full-stack feature development across PHP backend and HTML/CSS, JavaScript, and Bootstrap frontend components.
highlights: Supported deployments, documentation, maintenance, user training, and internal/client presentations.

items.title: Enterprise Platforms & Workflow Systems
items.description: Internal platforms for operations, project tracking, document handling, and multi-role workflows.

items.title: API Integrations & Automation
items.description: Integrations and automation for third-party systems, including German accounting standards.

items.title: PHP Backend Engineering
items.description: Backend services with clean architecture, testing, and scalable APIs.

items.title: Full-Stack Web Delivery
items.description: Modern front ends connected to reliable APIs for data-heavy apps.

items.title: Legacy Modernization & Performance
items.description: Upgrade and refactor legacy PHP systems for stability, security, and speed.

items.title: Technical Leadership
items.description: Lead teams and deliver predictable releases with clear standards.

contact.heading: Get In Touch
contact.subheading: Ready to collaborate on your next project? Let's discuss how I can help build scalable solutions for your business needs.

contact_info.title: Availability
contact_info.value: Open to Full-Time Roles & Freelance Projects

footer.built_with: Built with ❤️ and passion for innovation

projects.heading: Featured Projects
projects.subheading: Selected work highlighting enterprise platforms, integrations, and end-to-end delivery.

items.title: Enterprise Management System
items.description: Enterprise platform for operations, document handling, and compliance-heavy workflows with DATEV integration and multi-language support on Yii.

developmentDetails.label: Architecture
developmentDetails.text: Structured as a multi-module Yii application to keep admin workflows, document handling, and integrations isolated and maintainable.

developmentDetails.label: Data & Compliance
developmentDetails.text: Implemented DATEV and ZUGFeRD flows to support finance-oriented document exchange with consistent data handling.

developmentDetails.label: Business Value
developmentDetails.text: Gives operations teams a centralized workspace for project tracking, document processing, and multilingual collaboration.

items.title: Education Management Information System (EMIS)
items.description: Education management system for admissions, student and staff records, parent access, and finance workflows built with PHP.

developmentDetails.label: Architecture
developmentDetails.text: Organized around school administration workflows so admissions, records, and finance modules could evolve independently.

developmentDetails.label: Data Management
developmentDetails.text: Designed around student, staff, and parent records with reporting-ready structures for administrative visibility.

developmentDetails.label: Business Value
developmentDetails.text: Reduced manual coordination by bringing academic, parent-facing, and finance processes into one system.

items.title: Donor Management System
items.description: Donor and campaign management platform with Laravel and React for contribution tracking, reporting, and outreach workflows.

developmentDetails.label: Architecture
developmentDetails.text: Built as a Laravel-backed admin platform with React-driven screens for fast donor and campaign operations.

developmentDetails.label: Workflow Design
developmentDetails.text: Focused on contribution lifecycle handling, from donor profiles to campaign reporting and payment touchpoints.

developmentDetails.label: Business Value
developmentDetails.text: Helps fundraising teams track contributions, measure campaigns, and keep reporting aligned with real activity.

items.title: Task Manager
items.description: Task management system built with Symfony for structured workflows, team collaboration, and role-based access.

developmentDetails.label: Architecture
developmentDetails.text: Implemented as a Symfony application with clear separation between task workflow logic, roles, and UI actions.

developmentDetails.label: Workflow Design
developmentDetails.text: Supports status-driven task movement so team members can manage work through predictable stages.

developmentDetails.label: Business Value
developmentDetails.text: Improves delivery coordination by giving teams a shared space for tasks, ownership, and progress tracking.

items.title: Portfolio Website
items.description: Job-centric personal portfolio built with React, Vite, and Tailwind CSS, featuring animation, project highlights, and EmailJS contact automation.

developmentDetails.label: Architecture
developmentDetails.text: Built as a React and Vite single-page experience with animation-driven sections and reusable content blocks.

developmentDetails.label: Automation Workflow
developmentDetails.text: Integrated EmailJS to route contact submissions into a branded autoresponder and reply notification flow.

developmentDetails.label: Business Value
developmentDetails.text: Turns the portfolio into a live lead-capture surface instead of a static showcase page.

items.title: Currency Converter App
items.description: Real-time currency conversion application built with Laravel, live exchange rates, and responsive currency switching.

developmentDetails.label: Architecture
developmentDetails.text: Kept API access and conversion logic in Laravel so rate retrieval and UI behavior stayed easy to maintain.

developmentDetails.label: API Reliability
developmentDetails.text: Used Guzzle-based requests with fallback handling to keep the conversion flow predictable when rates change.

developmentDetails.label: Business Value
developmentDetails.text: Provides a lightweight financial utility with current exchange data and a simple user experience.

items.title: Ticket Management System
items.description: Workflow-driven ticket management system with routing, notifications, user roles, and reporting features.

developmentDetails.label: Architecture
developmentDetails.text: Designed around ticket states and role-specific actions so support processes stay organized and traceable.

developmentDetails.label: Workflow Automation
developmentDetails.text: Built routing and notification logic to surface the right tickets to the right users at the right time.

developmentDetails.label: Business Value
developmentDetails.text: Improves support throughput and visibility by reducing manual ticket handling.

items.title: Employee Performance Tracker
items.description: HR performance tracking system with metrics, dashboards, analytics, and export capabilities.

developmentDetails.label: Architecture
developmentDetails.text: Built as an analytics-oriented HR dashboard where performance data and exports remain easy to extend.

developmentDetails.label: Reporting Layer
developmentDetails.text: Focused on visual scorecards and downloadable reports so managers can review performance quickly.

developmentDetails.label: Business Value
developmentDetails.text: Turns employee tracking into a measurable process instead of a manual spreadsheet workflow.

items.title: Laravel Auth & Role Management App
items.description: Laravel application focused on authentication, authorization, and role-based access control with Gates, policies, and Eloquent relationships.

developmentDetails.label: Architecture
developmentDetails.text: Structured around authentication and access-control boundaries so each role sees only the right screens and actions.

developmentDetails.label: Security Model
developmentDetails.text: Applied Gates, policies, and role-aware views to keep authorization rules consistent across the app.

developmentDetails.label: Business Value
developmentDetails.text: Provides a reusable foundation for secure, role-driven admin systems and CRUD-heavy business tools.

items.title: Academic Institution Website
items.description: Custom academic institution website with CAPTCHA-protected authentication, role-based dashboards, performance modules, and form management.

developmentDetails.label: Architecture
developmentDetails.text: Designed as a role-aware school website with separate public pages and private dashboards for operations.

developmentDetails.label: User Experience
developmentDetails.text: Included CAPTCHA-backed registration and recovery flows to reduce abuse while keeping access straightforward.

developmentDetails.label: Business Value
developmentDetails.text: Supports academic communication, student data, and application handling in a single web platform.

items.title: Laravel Authentication & CRUD System
items.description: Laravel 10 MVC system combining authentication with product management CRUD operations and secure user access.

developmentDetails.label: Architecture
developmentDetails.text: Built on Laravel MVC conventions to keep authentication and product management logic cleanly separated.

developmentDetails.label: Form Handling
developmentDetails.text: Used validation and CRUD flow control to keep product actions safe and predictable.

developmentDetails.label: Business Value
developmentDetails.text: Acts as a practical foundation for internal admin tools that need secure login plus content management.

items.title: Corporate Insurance Website
items.description: Corporate insurance website with dynamic inquiry submission, application processing, SQL schema scripts, and styled components.

developmentDetails.label: Architecture
developmentDetails.text: Created as a custom PHP site with separate front-end pages and back-end form handling for inquiries.

developmentDetails.label: Lead Capture
developmentDetails.text: Focused on converting site visits into actionable inquiries through a clear submission flow.

developmentDetails.label: Business Value
developmentDetails.text: Helps insurance teams collect and process customer requests with less manual effort.

items.title: Laravel Authentication Showcase
items.description: Laravel authentication showcase covering registration, login/logout, password reset, and email verification through scaffolding and middleware.

developmentDetails.label: Architecture
developmentDetails.text: Built to demonstrate Laravel's auth scaffolding and middleware flow in a clean, inspectable structure.

developmentDetails.label: Security & Access
developmentDetails.text: Covers the full user lifecycle with password recovery and verification to reinforce account safety.

developmentDetails.label: Business Value
developmentDetails.text: Useful as a reference implementation for teams needing a baseline authentication setup.

items.title: Laravel MVC CRUD Application
items.description: Laravel MVC example demonstrating create, read, update, and delete operations with form request validation.

developmentDetails.label: Architecture
developmentDetails.text: Built around resourceful routing and MVC conventions to keep CRUD behavior easy to extend.

developmentDetails.label: Data Layer
developmentDetails.text: Uses migrations and model binding to keep data changes and controller actions aligned.

developmentDetails.label: Business Value
developmentDetails.text: Provides a practical blueprint for Laravel CRUD apps that need predictable structure and validation.
